phases: Phase 1: Environment block + preflight one-liner + lint enforcement

limitations: V1 ships only Options C + D from GH #79; Options A (CLI subcommand dispatch) and B (install-time path rewrite) deferred to future phase; preflight WARN-only (not ABORT) to preserve Phase 75 SKIP behavior on non-Python hosts
non_goals: per-invocation preflight (issue literal reading) -- V1 uses per-skill preflight at Execution Protocol entry; new CLI subcommand surface; install-time skill rewriting; changes to Phase 75 SKIP behavior or Step Prerequisites blocks
exclusions: no changes to qor.reliability or qor.scripts modules; no changes to qor/installer.py or variant emission; no new CI workflow; reference file qor/skills/governance/qor-audit/references/phase37-subpasses.md not modified (covered transitively by qor-audit/SKILL.md preflight)
